creator: kaduk@mit.edu
text:
The atacontrol(8) man page does not mention that SATA300 (and presumably SATA150) are supported modes for the 'mode' subcommand; in fact, I am unable to change away from these modes as I attempt to debug a kernel issue.

Fix: 

Sorry, no patch today.  Maybe later
How-To-Repeat: `man atacontrol`
